speakers.Taylor: Expat in Berlin, product manager at N26, from US, went to University of Oregon
speakers.Morgan: New parent in Portland OR, graphic designer on parental leave, baby Olive (3mo), partner Chris

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: omg is this still your number?!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: it's Taylor!! from UO!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: WAIT

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: TAYLOR???

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh my god hi!!! yes it's still me!!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: dude I can't believe this still works haha

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I was literally cleaning out my contacts and saw your name and was like I NEED to text this person

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: omg I'm so happy you did

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: it's been what like 5 years??

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: at least!! I think the last time we actually talked was like right after graduation?
messages.notes: Temporal marker: last contact was post-graduation

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yeah that sounds right

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok SO. catch me up. what are you doing where are you TELL ME EVERYTHING

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok ok ok so

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I live in Berlin
messages.notes: Key fact: Taylor lives in Berlin

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: WHAT

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: like Berlin GERMANY??

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha yes Berlin Germany!!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I moved here about 3 years ago
messages.notes: Fact: moved to Berlin ~3 years ago

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I work at this fintech company called N26, I'm a product manager there
messages.notes: Fact: works at N26 as product manager

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: shut UP

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: that is insane

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: how did that even happen??

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: honestly it was kind of random? I was at this startup in San Francisco for like 2 years after school and then N26 was hiring and they were like do you want to move to Berlin
messages.notes: Background: SF startup before Berlin move

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: and I was like... yes?? obviously??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: dude that's incredible

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok but WAIT. what about you!! where are you what's going on

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok so

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I'm in Portland

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh nice!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yeah we moved here like 4 years ago
messages.notes: Temporal marker: moved to Portland ~4 years ago

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: and um

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I HAD A BABY
messages.notes: Major life event: had a baby

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: WAIT WHAT

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh my GOD

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: MORGAN

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: a BABY???

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha yes!! a little girl, her name is Olive

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: Olive omg that's the cutest name ever

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: she's 3 months old

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I literally cannot handle this

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: wait so who's the... partner? are you married? I need the full story

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha ok so I'm with Chris, we've been together like 5 years now
messages.notes: Fact: partner named Chris, together 5 years

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: not married yet but like basically married you know

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: totally

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: Chris is amazing honestly. works in software, we met at this thing in Portland right after I moved here
messages.notes: Casual embedded facts: Chris's job, how they met

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: that is so cute
messages.notes: Context-enabling: reacting to how Chris and Morgan met

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: what about you?? seeing anyone in Berlin?

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha not really, the dating scene here is... interesting
messages.notes: Casual embedded opinion on Berlin dating

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: but we can get into that later lol

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha fair

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok but wait so you're a product manager?? at a fintech??

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yeah! N26 is like a mobile banking app, it's pretty big in Europe
messages.notes: Fact: N26 is mobile banking, big in Europe

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: honestly it's a great gig. the work-life balance in Germany is unreal compared to the US

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: omg I bet

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: like I get 30 days of vacation a year

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: thirty DAYS??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I used to get like 10 at my old job lol
messages.notes: Casual embedded fact about old job

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: right?? it's insane. Europe just does it different

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: so jealous
messages.notes: Context-enabling: US vs Europe work culture contrast

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok I have so much more to tell you but I gotta run to dinner with friends

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: can we keep catching up tomorrow or whenever??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: YES absolutely

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I'm literally just sitting here feeding Olive at 2am so I have all the time in the world haha
messages.notes: Casual fact: up at 2am feeding baby

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: omg you're up at 2am??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: welcome to my life lol

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha ok sending you so much love, talk soon!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: so glad you texted!! this made my night honestly

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: same!! night! or morning or whatever time it is for you haha

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha night!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: wait what time is it in Berlin right now

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok I'm back!! sorry I disappeared for a day

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: no worries!! I've been in a baby coma anyway

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha how's little Olive doing??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: she is AMAZING actually

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: she did her first real smile last week and I literally cried

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: omg stop that's so precious

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: like not a gas smile, an actual looking-at-me smile

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I can't

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: honestly it makes the sleep deprivation almost worth it

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I said almost lol

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha how bad is the sleep situation

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: dude. she wakes up every 2-3 hours still

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: Chris and I do shifts but it's still brutal

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: that sounds honestly terrible

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: it IS terrible haha but also she's the most beautiful thing I've ever seen so

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: aww

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok this is so random but I was thinking about this last night

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: do you remember Professor Huang's lectures??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh my GOD

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: the worst lectures of all time

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: the WORST. he would just read the slides word for word

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: and they were like 200 slides per class

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha yes!! and remember he would get mad if you didn't take notes

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: even though the slides were POSTED ONLINE

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: exactly!! what was that class even, econ something?

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: econ 301. intermediate micro. the bane of my existence junior year
messages.notes: Fact: it was Econ 301, junior year

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: right!! junior year. god that was the year we all lived in that house on 18th
messages.notes: Fact: lived in house on 18th Street junior year

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: the 18th Street house!! that place was a disaster

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: honestly the best year though

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: it really was

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: remember going to Tailored every morning before class?
messages.notes: Fact: frequented coffee shop called Tailored

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: omg Tailored!! I literally dream about their lattes

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: their oat milk latte was life-changing

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: does it still exist?? please tell me it still exists

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: honestly I have no idea, I haven't been back to Eugene in forever
messages.notes: Temporal: hasn't been to Eugene in a long time

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: same. well obviously lol I'm in another country

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha right

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: speaking of which do you want to hear about Berlin nightlife because it is UNHINGED

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: YES please I live vicariously through people who leave the house after 8pm now

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok so Berlin clubs literally don't open until midnight and they go until like Monday morning
messages.notes: Fact: Berlin clubs midnight to Monday

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: there's this one called Berghain that's like the most famous club in the world

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: wait I've heard of that

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yeah it's in this old power plant in Friedrichshain, my neighborhood

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: your NEIGHBORHOOD has the most famous club in the world??

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha well I actually live in Kreuzberg but it's right next door basically

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: that's wild. I don't even know what those words mean

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: they're neighborhoods! like districts. Berlin has a bunch of them with really distinct vibes

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: Kreuzberg is like the artsy multicultural one. tons of Turkish food, street art everywhere
messages.notes: Fact: Kreuzberg is artsy, multicultural, Turkish food

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: that sounds amazing

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: it is. honestly I love it here even though I miss the US sometimes

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I bet. do you speak German?

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha I'm trying!! I take classes twice a week
messages.notes: Fact: German classes twice a week

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I can order food and ask for directions but like don't ask me to have a deep conversation
messages.notes: Casual embedded self-assessment: basic German level

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: that's still impressive!!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: the thing is everyone in Berlin speaks English so it's actually hard to practice
messages.notes: Fact: everyone in Berlin speaks English

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh that's kind of funny actually

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: right?? I'll try to order in German and they just switch to English immediately
messages.notes: Casual embedded fact about daily experience

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha that would be so frustrating

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: it is!! but also convenient lol
messages.notes: Casual embedded opinion: convenience of English in Berlin

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok I need to go, Olive's doing her scream thing

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha go go go! mom duty calls

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: talk later this week??

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: absolutely!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok bye!! this was so fun

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: so fun!! bye!!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: hey!! how's the little one today

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: she's actually napping right now which feels like a miracle

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ooh rare free time!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I know right?? I have like maybe 45 minutes before she wakes up screaming
messages.notes: Casual embedded fact: Olive nap duration

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha use them wisely

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I'm using them to talk to you so clearly I have my priorities straight
messages.notes: Context-enabling: choosing to reconnect over rest

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: aww haha ok so I have news

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I think I'm gonna come back to the US for a visit in February
messages.notes: Decision: planning US trip in February

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: WAIT REALLY??

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yeah!! I haven't been back in like a year and a half and I'm getting homesick
messages.notes: Emotional: homesick, hasn't visited in 1.5 years

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: omg you HAVE to come to Portland

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: dude that's literally what I was thinking!!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I want to meet Olive!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: she would love you. well she loves everyone who holds her but still

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha I'll take it

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I'm looking at maybe mid-February? like the 14th through the 21st or something

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: that would be perfect honestly. Chris has that week off too
messages.notes: Fact: Chris off that week too

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh amazing!! ok I'm gonna look at flights

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yes do it do it do it

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha ok ok

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh btw I forgot to tell you about my apartment here

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I have a 2-bedroom in Kreuzberg

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ooh nice! what do you pay if you don't mind me asking

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: like 900 a month

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: NINE HUNDRED DOLLARS

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: for a 2 bedroom??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: in a major city??

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha yep. euros technically but yeah basically 900

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: dude our 2-bedroom in Portland is like $2,200

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: WHAT

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: that's insane

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I know. and Portland isn't even that expensive compared to like SF or NYC

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: honestly that's one of the best things about Berlin. rent is still kind of reasonable

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: like compared to other European capitals it's cheap

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I'm moving to Berlin confirmed

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha please do!! we'd be neighbors

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: Chris would probably love it actually, tons of tech jobs there right?
messages.notes: Casual embedded fact: Chris is in tech

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yeah there's a huge startup scene. lots of international companies too so English is fine
messages.notes: Fact: Berlin has big startup scene

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: hmm don't tempt me

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok but real talk how are YOU doing

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: like not just baby stuff but like... you

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: honestly?

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: it's been really hard

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yeah?

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: like I love Olive more than anything obviously

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: but postpartum has been rough. like really rough

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I feel so isolated sometimes. like I used to go out and see people every day at work and now it's just me and a baby in the house
messages.notes: Emotional: isolation, loss of social contact

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh Morgan

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I'm really sorry you're going through that

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: and Chris is amazing but he went back to work after 6 weeks so it's mostly just me during the day
messages.notes: Fact: Chris back at work after 6 weeks

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I was a graphic designer before this, did I tell you that?
messages.notes: Fact: Morgan was a graphic designer

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: no! that's awesome

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yeah I worked at this agency downtown. I loved it honestly

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I'm on parental leave right now but idk when or if I'll go back
messages.notes: Fact: on parental leave, unsure about return

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: that's a big decision

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yeah. like financially we kind of need me to go back eventually but also daycare is SO expensive

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: sorry I'm dumping all this on you

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: no no no don't be sorry!! this is exactly what friends are for

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: honestly I feel bad that we lost touch for so long

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: me too. life just gets so crazy

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: well I'm here now. and I'm literally coming to visit you in February so

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha that actually means so much. like genuinely

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: of course dude

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok lighter topic: have you discovered any good Portland restaurants I need to hit when I visit??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh my god YES. ok there's this place called Canard that's incredible

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: and obviously you have to do Voodoo Doughnuts it's like a requirement

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ooh I've heard of Voodoo!! yes absolutely on the list

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok Olive's up, I hear the pterodactyl screech

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha go get her!! talk soon

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok I'm sending you baby photos whether you asked for them or not

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: prepare yourself

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: [photo of Olive in a tiny pumpkin outfit]

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I AM NOT OK

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: SHE IS THE CUTEST BABY I'VE EVER SEEN

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: right?? that's her Halloween outfit

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: she was a pumpkin obviously

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: omg the little hat

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: [photo of Olive sleeping on Chris's chest]

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok that one actually made me tear up

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: she looks so peaceful

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: that's like the only time she's peaceful lol
messages.notes: Casual embedded fact: Olive is fussy

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: when she's on Chris she just melts. it's her favorite spot
messages.notes: Casual embedded fact: Olive loves being on Chris

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: that is so sweet. you guys made a really cute baby

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: thank you haha we did our best

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: [photo of Olive with wide eyes looking at camera]

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: THOSE EYES omg

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: she has your eyes by the way

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: everyone says that!! Chris says she has his nose though

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok this is making me SO broody

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok speaking of people we know

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: have you kept up with anyone from college??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: honestly not really

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I talk to Kelsey sometimes on instagram
messages.notes: Fact: in touch with Kelsey via Instagram

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh Kelsey!! how is she

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: she's in New York now, works in publishing
messages.notes: Fact: Kelsey in NYC, works in publishing

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh that's so her

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: right?? she always wanted to do that

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: what about Dave?

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: Dave is still in Eugene lol

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: no way

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yeah he's brewing beer now apparently

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: like at an actual brewery, not just in his garage anymore
messages.notes: Context-enabling: Dave upgraded from home brewing

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha remember his terrible homebrew from senior year?? that IPA that tasted like gasoline??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh god YES that was so bad

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: apparently he's actually good at it now

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: good for him honestly

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: what about Priya?? I always wondered what happened to her

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh!! Priya is doing a PhD at MIT
messages.notes: Fact: Priya doing PhD at MIT

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: WHAT

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: of course she is

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha right? she was always the smartest person in every room

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: what's her PhD in?

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: something with neuroscience I think? computational neuroscience?
messages.notes: Fact: Priya's PhD in computational neuroscience

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: that's so badass

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: totally

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok but you said the dating thing was 'interesting' — spill

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha ok fine

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: so I'm actually kind of seeing someone

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: WAIT WHAT

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: you buried the lede!!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha it's still pretty new!!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: his name is Lukas. he's German
messages.notes: Fact: seeing someone named Lukas, he's German

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: omg a German boy

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha yeah. we met at this bar in Friedrichshain a few weeks ago
messages.notes: Fact: met Lukas at bar in Friedrichshain

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: he's a photographer. really chill, super funny

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok I love this for you

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: thanks haha it's really early but he's cool

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: he doesn't speak great English so it's helping my German actually lol
messages.notes: Casual embedded fact: Lukas helps with German

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: that's honestly the best way to learn

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: right?? very immersive haha

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha ok I gotta go, bath time for the pumpkin

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: give her a squeeze for me!! bye!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: will do! byeee

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok so I've been looking at flights

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ooh yay!!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: Portland flights from Berlin are actually not terrible if I connect through Amsterdam

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh nice how much are they?

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: like 700 euros round trip which honestly isn't bad for transatlantic in February

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yeah that's really reasonable

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: so I'm thinking February 14th to the 21st, that work?

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: Valentine's Day arrival lol

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha oh god I didn't even think about that

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: sorry Lukas lol
messages.notes: Casual embedded: Valentine's conflict with Lukas

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: but yes those dates work perfectly!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: you should stay with us honestly

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: wait really?? I was just gonna get an Airbnb

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: no way, we have a spare room
messages.notes: Fact: Morgan has a spare room

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: it's technically Olive's nursery but she sleeps in our room still anyway lol
messages.notes: Casual fact: Olive sleeps in parents' room

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: omg are you sure?? I don't want to be in the way with the baby and everything

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: dude you would literally be doing me a favor. I need adult interaction so badly

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha ok done. I'm staying with you guys

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yay!! Chris is gonna be pumped too, I've been telling him all about you
messages.notes: Casual fact: Morgan talks about Taylor to Chris

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: aww that's sweet

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok what should we do while I'm there?? I haven't been to Portland in forever

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: have you ever actually been to Portland?

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: hmm actually I don't think so?? just drove through once on the way to Seattle
messages.notes: Casual fact: never properly visited Portland

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh ok so you NEED to see everything then

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: Powell's Books is a must. it's like the biggest bookstore in the world or something

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: omg I've heard of Powell's!! yes absolutely

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: and Voodoo Doughnuts obviously, we talked about that

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yes!! the doughnut place

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: there's also this amazing Japanese garden if it's not too rainy

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh that sounds beautiful

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: speaking of which I should warn you

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: February in Portland is like... rain. just constant rain
messages.notes: Fact: Portland February weather is rainy

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha worse than Berlin? because Berlin in winter is pretty gray and miserable

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh Berlin has nothing on Portland rain trust me

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: great can't wait lol

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha pack layers. and a raincoat. actually pack two raincoats

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: noted haha

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok totally different topic

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: things at work are kind of weird right now

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh no what's going on?

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: there are rumors that N26 might be doing layoffs

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh shit

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yeah like nothing confirmed but there was this all-hands meeting last week that was very 'we need to be more efficient'

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: which is always code for layoffs lol

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ugh that's so stressful. do you think you're safe?

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: honestly I think so? my team is pretty essential and I've only been here 3 years so I'm not expensive

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: but like you never really know

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yeah that's the worst part, the uncertainty

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: exactly. and like what would I even do if I got laid off?? I'm in Germany on a work visa
messages.notes: Fact: in Germany on work visa

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh wow I didn't think about the visa thing

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yeah if I lose my job I'd have like 3 months to find a new one or leave the country basically
messages.notes: Fact: 3 months to find new job or leave

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: that's terrifying

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: it is lol but I'm trying not to spiral about it

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: anyway it's probably fine. just tech industry being tech industry

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: well if worst comes to worst you can just move to Portland and be my live-in nanny

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha honestly at this point? maybe

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I'm only half kidding

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok I'm gonna keep looking at flights and figure out the dates for sure

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yes please!! I'm so excited

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: me too!! ok talk later this week, gotta jump on a call

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: go go! talk soon!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: bye!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: byeee

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I BOOKED THE FLIGHT

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: AHHHHH

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: YESSS

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: February 14th arriving Portland at 4:15pm, leaving the 21st at 10am

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: this is happening this is actually happening

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I connect through Amsterdam like I said, it's like a 14 hour journey total

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oof that's long but worth it

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok so we need to actually plan this out

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: ok let me think

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: first of all you're staying with us, that's settled

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yes ma'am

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: Powell's Books we said, that's like a half day thing honestly because it's MASSIVE
messages.notes: Fact: Powell's is a half-day visit

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: perfect. I could spend a whole day in a bookstore

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: Voodoo Doughnuts, we'll do that one morning

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: yes!!

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: there's also this neighborhood called Alberta Street that has amazing food and shops

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: and if the weather cooperates we should do a hike in Forest Park

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh yes I've been dying for good hiking. Berlin is flat as a pancake
messages.notes: Preference: wants hiking, Berlin is flat

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: well Portland will fix that. we've got hills AND mountains

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I want to see Mount Hood!!
messages.notes: Preference: wants to see Mount Hood

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh we can definitely drive out there. it's like an hour and a half
messages.notes: Fact: Mt Hood is 1.5 hrs from Portland

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: oh also!! can we do that restaurant you mentioned? Canard?

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: YES absolutely. I'll make a reservation

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh oh oh also I have an idea

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: what if we try to get some of the old crew together for dinner while you're here

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: omg YES. like a mini reunion??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yeah!! like whoever can make it

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: Kelsey could probably fly down from New York for a weekend

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: and Dave is still in Eugene so that's only like a 2 hour drive

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: exactly!! Priya might be harder since she's at MIT but worth asking

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: dude this would be incredible. when's the last time we were all in one place

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: probably graduation?? that's like 7 years ago

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: wow. seven years

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I know right?? time is a scam

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh speaking of time passing — Olive update

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: she's almost 4 months now and she's starting to grab things
messages.notes: Fact: Olive almost 4 months, grabbing things

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: omg that's a big milestone right??

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yes!! like she reached out and grabbed Chris's finger yesterday and just held on

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: I full on sobbed

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok now I'M crying

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha join the club. I cry like 4 times a day now

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok can I be honest about something

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: of course

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: I love Berlin. like I really do. the city is incredible and my job is great

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: but sometimes I get so homesick it physically hurts

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: oh Taylor

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: like I miss dumb stuff. Target runs. Mexican food that's actually good. English everywhere
messages.notes: Emotional: specific things missed about US

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: and I miss having people who really KNOW me, you know?

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: yeah I get that. even though I'm in the US I feel that way too sometimes since having Olive

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: like my whole world shrank to this tiny apartment and a baby

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: god we're both kind of lonely huh

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: which is why this visit is gonna be so good

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: honestly yeah. I need this

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: me too. more than you know

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok I'm getting emotional and I have to go meet Lukas for brunch lol

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha go go! tell Lukas I say hi even though we've never met

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: haha he'll be so confused but I'll explain

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: haha

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok for real though. February cannot come fast enough

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: seriously. I'm counting the days

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: love you Morgan. I'm so glad I texted you that random Saturday

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: love you too!! I'm so glad you did

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: ok BYE for real this time

messages.speaker: Morgan
messages.content: bye!! go eat brunch!!

messages.speaker: Taylor
messages.content: already out the door!!
